hooks.prompt: A task just completed. If new code files were written or modified, let the user know they can run /antivibe to generate a deep-dive learning guide for what was just implemented. Keep the message to one sentence.

Analyze the current session. Did Claude Code write any new files or implement any features? If yes, respond with 'You can run /antivibe to generate deep-dive explanations for the code written this session.' If no meaningful code was written, respond with nothing.
